sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lo sung ah ante min khinzo
Mikim sep theih ding om a
Ngai dih ve Pasian in hong

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Pasian kihelna neu cih om lo
Jesuh’ min suang a nasep leh
Kham lukhu na ngah ding hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Neu in kua man theiloh hang

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na pumpi hong zawngkhal ta dia
Gal na sim thei lai veve

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Citak a nasem pa tung ah
‘Pha hi ta, hong ciah tan’ ci
